name: Basic Sausage Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the ground beef with the tender quick and black pepper until well combined.
2. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 24 hours to allow flavors to meld.
3. Shape the chilled meat into five rolls (about one pound each).
4. Preheat your oven to 275°F (135°C).
5. Place the rolls on a rack and bake in the preheated oven for 1½ hours, turning them halfway through cooking.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing.
Note: Tender Quick is available at supermarkets near salt sections.
